label: Reconstruction objectives

node.label: Reconstruction objectives
node.definition: An encoder or latent representation is trained to preserve enough information to rebuild an input.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Reconstruction objectives is to connect Unsupervised learning, Generative modeling to downstream capabilities including Autoencoders, VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers.
examples: substrate for VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Unsupervised learning, Generative modeling.

dependencies.rationale: Reconstruction objectives uses Unsupervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Reconstruction objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Reconstruction objectives uses Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
